t_en: Warm, golden hour light just before sunset — soft, flattering
t_de: Warmes, goldenes Stundenlicht kurz vor Sonnenuntergang — weich, schmeichelhaft

t_en: Brief window after sunset — diffuse, dreamlike, no shadows
t_de: Kurzes Fenster nach Sonnenuntergang — diffus, traumhaft, keine Schatten

t_en: Deep blue twilight — cold, quiet, melancholic, urban shimmer
t_de: Tiefblaues Dämmerungslicht — kalt, ruhig, melancholisch, urban shimmer

t_en: Hard sunlight — strong shadows under eyes and nose, exposure, unglamour
t_de: Hartes Sonnenlicht — starke Schatten unter Augen und Nase, Exposition, Unglamour

t_en: Cloudy, evenly diffuse — no drama, everything visible, documentary quality
t_de: Bewölkt, gleichmäßig diffus — kein Drama, alles sichtbar, documentary quality

t_en: Classic studio light — key / fill / rim, controlled, polished
t_de: Klassisches Studiolicht — Key / Fill / Rim, kontrolliert, polished

t_en: Colorful neon lights — urban, wet, dangerous, neo noir palette
t_de: Bunte Neon-Lichter — urban, feucht, gefährlich, neo noir palette

t_en: Only existing light sources — realistic, unpolished, found-light aesthetic
t_de: Nur vorhandene Lichtquellen — realistisch, unpoliert, found-light aesthetic

t_en: Backlight — rim light on silhouette, subject against brightness
t_de: Gegenlicht — Rim-Light auf Silhouette, subject against brightness

t_en: Bright, few shadows — optimistic, clean, clinical or optimistic
t_de: Hell, wenig Schatten — optimistisch, sauber, clinical or optimistic

t_en: Dark, dramatic shadows — pool of light, noir, emphasis through darkness
t_de: Dunkel, dramatische Schatten — Pool of light, noir, emphasis through darkness

t_en: Extreme light-dark contrast — Caravaggio in film, theatrical tension
t_de: Extremer Hell-Dunkel-Kontrast — Caravaggio in Film, theatrical tension

t_en: Candlelight — very warm (1800K), flickering, intimate, period-correct
t_de: Kerzenlicht — sehr warm (1800K), flackernd, intimate, period-correct

t_en: Warm incandescent light — 3200K, amber shadows, domestic spaces
t_de: Warmes Glühlampenlicht — 3200K, amber shadows, domestic spaces

t_en: Light through leaves or blinds — moving patterns, living surfaces
t_de: Licht durch Blätter oder Jalousien — bewegte Muster, lebendige Oberflächen

t_en: Flickering fire or fireplace light — deep orange, dramatic shadows
t_de: Flackendes Feuer- oder Kaminlicht — tief orange, dramatische Schatten

t_en: Cold greenish industrial light — factory halls, parking garages, desaturated
t_de: Kalt-grünliches Industrielicht — Fabrikhallen, Parkhäuser, desaturiert

t_en: Broken fluorescent tube — intermittent, harsh, institutional threat
t_de: Defekte Neonröhre — intermittierend, harsh, institutionelle Bedrohung

t_en: Natural window light — diffuse directional, soft shadows, painterly quality
t_de: Natürliches Fensterlicht — diffus direktional, soft shadows, painterly quality

t_en: Orange-yellow street light — monochrome, warm, decades of night streets
t_de: Orange-gelbes Straßenlicht — monochrom, warm, decades of night streets

t_en: Strong side light — half face in shadow, texture revealed
t_de: Stark seitliches Licht — halbes Gesicht im Schatten, texture revealed

t_en: Indirect key light — softened, soft wrap, shadow still present
t_de: Indirektes Hauptlicht — gedämpft, soft wrap, shadow still present

t_en: Contour light only — silhouette effect, minimal information, mystery
t_de: Nur Konturlicht — Silhouette-Effekt, minimale Information, mystery

t_en: Red emergency light — alarm, danger, physical urgency, horror tradition
t_de: Rotes Notlicht — Alarm, danger, physical urgency, horror tradition

t_en: Cold white overhead — clinical, sterile, neutral and merciless
t_de: Kaltes weißes Overhead — clinical, sterile, neutral and merciless

t_en: Hard ceiling light from above — interrogation room, no escape from the light
t_de: Harte Deckenleuchte von oben — Verhörraum, no escape from the light
